comments.text: GPT-5.5 Pro + harness proposes a note giving an apparently new partial bound: a 3/10 minimum-degree bound for 4-critical graphs. A Lean formalization (Codex + harness) is here: formalized proof. It proves \(8e(G)/n^2+\delta(G)/n\le 3/2+o(1)\), hence \(\delta(G)\le(3/10+o(1))n\).

Congrats. Standard check found no issues. This built on this work of Luo, Ma, and Yang which showed the minimum degree $\delta(G) < 0.328 n$. The present work improved this to $\delta(G) \le (3/10 + o(1)) n$.
Sorry, my fault, should say edges in the second.
